description: [Riso] Monthly Lesson Count – Add Teacher Popup
suite: [Riso] Monthly Lesson Count – Add Teacher Popup

title: [Riso] Add Teacher Popup – Monthly Lesson Count Column – Column Visible With Count Value
description: AC 01.2 — Regression Analysis — Monthly Lesson Count column appears in the Add Teacher popup and shows a count value for teachers who have lessons in the selected lesson's month.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP
- A lesson exists in January 2026 with status = Draft
- Teacher A is assigned to 3 lessons in January 2026 (all status = Published)
- User is logged in as CM or HQ
steps_result:
1. "Open the January 2026 lesson detail page"
2. "On the Lesson Teacher section, click Add Teachers"
3. "Locate Teacher A in the list"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson Detail page displays correctly"
2. "Add Teacher popup opens showing the teacher list"
3. "Monthly Lesson Count (今月の授業数) column is visible; Teacher A shows count = 3"

title: [Riso] Add Teacher Popup – Monthly Lesson Count – Count Reflects Draft + Published + Completed Only
description: AC 01.2 — Decision Table — Count equals the sum of Draft, Published, and Completed lessons in the selected month; other statuses are ignored.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP
- A lesson exists in March 2026 (target lesson for popup)
- Teacher B has in March 2026: 1 Draft, 2 Published, 1 Completed, 1 Cancelled lesson
- User is logged in as CM
steps_result:
1. "Open the March 2026 target lesson detail"
2. "Click Add Teachers to open the popup"
3. "Locate Teacher B in the list"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson Detail displays for March 2026"
2. "Add Teacher popup opens"
3. "Monthly Lesson Count for Teacher B = 4 (Draft 1 + Published 2 + Completed 1); Cancelled lesson is NOT included"

title: [Riso] Add Teacher Popup – Monthly Lesson Count – Cancelled Lessons Excluded
description: AC 01.2 — Decision Table / Negative Testing — A teacher with only Cancelled lessons in the selected month shows count = 0, not the cancelled count.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP
- A target lesson exists in February 2026
- Teacher C has 3 lessons in February 2026, all status = Cancelled
- Teacher C has no Draft/Published/Completed lessons in February 2026
steps_result:
1. "Open the February 2026 target lesson detail"
2. "Click Add Teachers to open the popup"
3. "Locate Teacher C in the list"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson Detail displays for February 2026"
2. "Add Teacher popup opens"
3. "Monthly Lesson Count for Teacher C = 0 (Cancelled lessons are excluded)"

title: [Riso] Add Teacher Popup – Monthly Lesson Count – Zero Lessons Shows 0 Not Blank
description: AC 01.2 — Boundary Value Analysis — A teacher with no lessons in the selected month shows 0 in the count column, not an empty cell.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP
- A target lesson exists in April 2026
- Teacher D has no lessons in April 2026 (no assignments of any status)
steps_result:
1. "Open the April 2026 target lesson detail"
2. "Click Add Teachers to open the popup"
3. "Locate Teacher D in the list"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson Detail displays for April 2026"
2. "Add Teacher popup opens"
3. "Monthly Lesson Count cell for Teacher D shows 0 — the cell is not blank, not empty, not a dash"

title: [Riso] Add Teacher Popup – Monthly Lesson Count – Cross-Location Count Included
description: AC 01.2 — Decision Table — Count includes lessons from all of the teacher's locations, not only the location of the selected lesson.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP
- Target lesson is at Location A in May 2026
- Teacher E is assigned to 3 lessons at Location A in May 2026 (Published) and 2 lessons at Location B in May 2026 (Published)
- Teacher E is affiliated to both Location A and Location B
steps_result:
1. "Open the May 2026 target lesson detail at Location A"
2. "Click Add Teachers to open the popup"
3. "Locate Teacher E in the list"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson Detail displays for May 2026, Location A"
2. "Add Teacher popup opens"
3. "Monthly Lesson Count for Teacher E = 5 (3 from Location A + 2 from Location B)"

title: [Riso] Add Teacher Popup – Monthly Lesson Count – Count Uses Selected Lesson's Month Not Today's
description: AC 01.2 — Decision Table — When the selected lesson is in a past or future month, the count reflects that lesson's month, not the current month.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP; today is April 2026
- A target lesson exists in January 2026 (past month)
- Teacher F has 5 lessons in January 2026 (Published) and 2 lessons in April 2026 (Published)
steps_result:
1. "Open the January 2026 lesson detail"
2. "Click Add Teachers to open the popup"
3. "Locate Teacher F in the list"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson Detail displays for January 2026"
2. "Add Teacher popup opens"
3. "Monthly Lesson Count for Teacher F = 5 (January count); count is NOT 2 (April count)"

title: [Riso] Add Teacher Popup – Monthly Lesson Count – Count Fixed After Filter Applied
description: AC 01.2 — Decision Table / Negative Testing — Applying any filter does not change the Monthly Lesson Count value.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP
- Target lesson exists in June 2026
- Teacher G has 4 lessons in June 2026 (Published); part-time; affiliated to Location A; subject: Math
- Add Teacher popup is open; Teacher G visible with count = 4
steps_result:
1. "Open popup — note Teacher G Monthly Lesson Count"
2. "Apply filter: Location = Location A"
3. "Observe Teacher G Monthly Lesson Count"
4. "Apply filter: Working Type = Part-time"
5. "Observe Teacher G Monthly Lesson Count"
6. "Apply filter: Subject = Math"
7. "Observe Teacher G Monthly Lesson Count"
steps_data:
1. "Teacher G shows Monthly Lesson Count = 4"
2. "Teacher list reloads filtered; Teacher G is still visible"
3. "Count = 4 (unchanged by location filter)"
4. "Teacher list reloads"
5. "Count = 4 (unchanged by working type filter)"
6. "Teacher list reloads"
7. "Count = 4 (unchanged by subject filter)"

title: [Riso] Add Teacher Popup – Monthly Lesson Count Column – Not Sortable
description: AC 01.2 — Negative Testing — Clicking the Monthly Lesson Count column header does not sort the teacher list.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP
- Target lesson exists with multiple teachers visible in the popup, each with a different Monthly Lesson Count value
steps_result:
1. "Open the Add Teacher popup; note the order of teachers and their count values"
2. "Click the Monthly Lesson Count column header"
3. "Click the column header again"
steps_data:
1. "Teacher list is displayed in the default sort order"
2. "The teacher list order does not change; no ascending/descending sort is applied"
3. "The teacher list order remains unchanged"

title: [Riso] Add Teacher Popup – Monthly Lesson Count – Centre Staff Can See Column
description: AC 01.2 — Permission Matrix — A Centre Staff (SPU login) user who can open the Add Teacher popup also sees the Monthly Lesson Count column.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP
- User is logged in as Centre Staff (SPU login)
- A lesson exists where the Centre Staff has permission to open the Add Teacher dialog
steps_result:
1. "Log in as Centre Staff (SPU)"
2. "Navigate to a lesson detail page"
3. "Click Add Teachers to open the popup"
4. "Observe the teacher list columns"
steps_data:
1. "Login successful"
2. "Lesson Detail page displays"
3. "Add Teacher popup opens"
4. "Monthly Lesson Count (今月の授業数) column is visible"

title: [Riso] Add Teacher Popup – Monthly Lesson Count – Timezone Boundary Last Day of Month
description: AC 01.2 + AC 01.3 — Boundary Value Analysis — A lesson on the last day of a month at late evening local time (JST) is counted in that month, not the next month.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP (Japan Standard Time, UTC+9)
- Teacher H is assigned to a lesson: Date Jan 31 2026, Time 23:30 JST (= Feb 1 00:30 UTC), Status: Published
- Teacher H has no other lessons in January or February 2026
- Target lesson is in January 2026
steps_result:
1. "Open the January 2026 target lesson detail"
2. "Click Add Teachers to open the popup"
3. "Locate Teacher H in the list"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson Detail page displays for January 2026"
2. "Add Teacher popup opens"
3. "Monthly Lesson Count for Teacher H = 1 (the Jan 31 23:30 JST lesson is counted in January, not February)"

title: [Riso] Add Teacher Popup – Monthly Lesson Count – Timezone Boundary First Day of Month
description: AC 01.2 + AC 01.3 — Boundary Value Analysis — A lesson on the first day of a month at early morning local time (JST) is counted in that month, not the previous month.
preconditions:
- Org is Riso OOP (Japan Standard Time, UTC+9)
- Teacher I is assigned to a lesson: Date Feb 1 2026, Time 00:30 JST (= Jan 31 15:30 UTC), Status: Published
- Teacher I has no other lessons in January or February 2026
- Target lesson is in February 2026
steps_result:
1. "Open the February 2026 target lesson detail"
2. "Click Add Teachers to open the popup"
3. "Locate Teacher I in the list"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson Detail page displays for February 2026"
2. "Add Teacher popup opens"
3. "Monthly Lesson Count for Teacher I = 1 (the Feb 1 00:30 JST lesson is counted in February, not January)"
